{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240129457793B2A43A4A0A93E449"}"},"total":3378},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6844025003718950919","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"果然，每次看到好看的书我都会停不下来，合计起来不到二十小时看完了，很精彩，也很吸引眼球，作者文笔也很稳，故事环环相扣，林枫死的时候，我想起一句话，人之将死其言也善，让人不自觉的跟着书走，推荐力度，五颗星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1593498749,"group_id":"6830927758898498568","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我来看小说不是来受气的，脾气不好，没脑子的别回复我评论，例如多少钱一条哥，种马哥，频道歧视哥，免得挨骂，我骂起人来自己都怕，懂？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx9CM4fJ5wIxDGpJTK6I0XZCMf1xN/oXeVFYno/kFIHt","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a0949ac6ddbb45afaf25098ed943d218~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875855&x-signature=3fhl8AT74fvnyQKN%2F%2B%2BIPPEBBvA%3D","user_id":"1187067506204222","user_name":"笑墨醋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1187067506204222","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6830927758898498568","book_info":{"abstract":"生活不止眼前的苟且，还有……闺女和田野。
从繁华都市回到故乡，偶获山神空间。
种田种菜，田野摘瓜果，爬树掏鸟窝，轻松又惬意。
养鸡遛狗，入山寻草药，下河补虾蟹，更野趣十足。
大黄，你是不是又坑二哈了？二哈，我批准你的二十万拆家计划了么？
对了，还有我可爱的闺女，来来，哄娃多简单，宠她就完事了。
糖葫芦？老爸给做。
冰淇淋？不是问题。
男朋友？可……我可以考虑打断他的腿。
单身奶爸林晨，就这样开启了别样的逆袭之路。
权柄财色不足贵，春花秋月方人间。
这就是我的悠然生活……！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/baf7a9037688eb8685622166ee322c60","author":"年末","author_id":"","book_id":"6830927758898498568","book_name":"悠然山村","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#58c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6830941052438839822","read_count":"11054","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2166546"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1045","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,奶爸,空间,多女主,1v1,发家致富,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/6969a8528b7d07cc6c624ab96e20cc00~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470985&x-signature=V60ZKZJtgcRCOFR%2F5E%2B2ZUFa1%2Fs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_li
